name: Contacts
description: Staff-only contacts/CRM directory. email is stored normalized (trim+lowercase) via normalizeEmail (src/utils/EmailUtils.ts) on every write. tags is a comma-separated list of segments (for Constant Contact segmentation; multiselect in UI). siteId scopes to a site for SiteManager/ProgramCoordinator; a BLANK siteId means program-wide (visible to ALL staff — these are shared, not site-specific). Site-scoped read = site rows + program-wide (blank siteId) union. All seed data DRAFT until UCF/Constant Contact export provides the real list.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: tags
columns.description: Comma-separated tags/segments for Constant Contact segmentation

columns.name: siteId
columns.description: Site for staff scope; BLANK = program-wide (all staff)
